name: 05-27-stitch-auto-expand-params
title: compact long-stitch auto-expand params panel on first image add
description: When the user adds the first image(s) in compact long-stitch editor, automatically expand the inline parameter panel (StitchInlineControlsContainer) so they immediately see the controls instead of having to discover the [⚙ 参数] chip.
creator: Reborn
